text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at this, Trainer. I've received a letter
from a fan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The letter's handwriting is so immaculate I almost
want to frame it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It was penned by an elderly lady who has
supported the Mejiro family since the height of
my grandmother's career.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
"You have planted your roots slowly, yet firmly.
The steady growth you display is most befitting of
the Mejiro mantle."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It is, but it's a great honor as well. She's
recognized me as a member of the Mejiro family,
and is expecting greatness from me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, McQueen, the previous generation, and the
generation before that—the Mejiro family tree is
tall and illustrious...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And I have been given the opportunity to add my
name to its branches.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I vow to become an Umamusume capable of
shouldering that responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And there is no time like the present.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm planting my roots in the earth. Can't you
tell? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As per usual, she's marching to the beat of her
own drum. But in her eyes, I see a fighter's spirit
and a burning pride.
